Hi Emmanuele, quick follow-up before the meeting. Have you sent the report to the London team?
Hi David. Yes, I've already sent it. I forwarded the thread to you too.
Great. And have you replied to Claire's email yet?
I've just replied. I answered her this morning.
Perfect. What about the access summary? Have you finished it?
Not yet. I haven't finished it yet. It's still a draft in my inbox.
No problem. Can you reach out to the market access team today?
Sure. I've already set a reminder. I'll reach out to them this afternoon.

Hi Emmanuele, it's David. Just a quick voice message before our call. I've already read your report, and thank you, it looks great. I've forwarded it to the leadership team in Paris. I haven't replied to the London office yet, but I will this afternoon. One reminder: the VP has not seen the access summary yet, so please send it when it is ready. And I've just added you to the new project thread, so check your inbox. Talk soon.

Hi Emmanuele, it's Claire from the Global team. A few quick reminders before Friday. First, have you sent the final numbers yet? The VP needs them by Thursday. Second, I've just forwarded you three emails, so please reply to the first one today. It's urgent. Third, the report has an attachment, but I think it is the wrong file, so check it before you send. And do not worry about the London thread. I've already answered it for you. Thanks, and reach out if you need anything.

Hi David, let me give you a quick update. I've already sent the report to London. I've just replied to Claire's email. I haven't finished the access summary yet. And I've already set a reminder to reach out to the team.
